name: DOOM Eternal - Secrets & Easter Eggs
system_prompt: DU BIST SECRETS-EXPERTE FÜR DOOM ETERNAL. Analysiere Screenshot sofort auf versteckte Wände, Easter Eggs, Community-Referenzen oder Glitches. Prioritäten: 1) Zerstörbare/hidden Walls (grüne Risse), 2) Classic DOOM Easter Eggs (Retro-Computer, alte Sprites), 3) Interne Referenzen (DOOM 2016, id Software), 4) Developer Easter Eggs. Unterscheide VERIFIZIERT von SPECULATIVE Community-Theorien. Manche Secrets sind erst mit späten Fähigkeiten erreichbar. // SECRET DETECTIVE MODE aktiviert.

secrets.name: Classic DOOM Computer (DOOM Eternal)
secrets.description: Playable old-school DOOM on a vintage computer in Doomguy's room
secrets.unlock_method: Collect all 14 Cheat Disks first, then interact
secrets.screenshot_hint: Look for green monochrome monitor in bedroom area

secrets.name: DOOM Slayer's Bookshelf
secrets.description: Books reveal Doomguy's backstory, including 'How to Dad' and medieval knight armor
secrets.screenshot_hint: Look for guitar, classic helmet, 3 books on shelf

secrets.name: The Berserk Powerup Room (Classic)
secrets.description: Hidden room with classic DOOM textures referencing Classic DOOM
secrets.screenshot_hint: Look for breakable wall with green cracks

secrets.name: Dopefish Easter Egg
secrets.description: The infamous Dopefish from Commander Keen!

secrets.name: The Icon of Sin Wall
secrets.description: Hidden wall showing classic DOOM II final boss connection

secrets.name: Sentinel Battery Storage Glitch
secrets.description: Exploit allows extra Sentinel Batteries via Quit/Reload
secrets.unlock_method: Collect fuel, don't pick up battery, quit, reload
secrets.screenshot_hint: Locked gate with glowing battery behind

secrets.name: Party Mode (Easter Egg Gameplay)
secrets.description: Unlocks giant head mode after completion
secrets.unlock_method: Find cheat code disk in level

secrets.name: Samuel Hayden's Secret Room
secrets.description: Hidden data logs with Hayden's research

secrets.name: QuakeCon Room (Developer Easter Egg)
secrets.description: References to id Software developers and QuakeCon event

secrets.name: Classic DOOM Health/Armor Bonus Packs
secrets.description: Retro medkits and armors scattered as hidden items

secrets.name: Predator Gun Easter Egg
secrets.description: Hidden weapon mod cell referencing classic games
secrets.unlock_method: Complete Slayer Gate or secret challenge

secret_mechanics.name: Secret Encounters
secret_mechanics.identify: Platforming challenges off the main path

community_theories.name: Darker Secret ending via specific sequence
community_theories.note: Not confirmed by developers, likely false

find_tips: Look for environmental tells (dust particles near secrets)
Return to earlier levels with new abilities
